title: Ensure Custom Resources are Properly Closed
description: Failure to properly close resources in an application can lead to memory issues and potential system crashes. This rule identifies instances where custom resources may be leaked due to improper closure.
recommendation: Ensure that all custom resources are properly closed to avoid resource leakage.
impact: Leaking resources can lead to memory issues, harming the performance and stability of the application.

checks.message: Rule: Ensure Custom Resources are Properly Closed
